lines.speaker: James
lines.text: I'm James. It's my job to tell you all there is to know about Old School Bonds.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: An Old School Bond will allow you to buy membership for your account using in game gold pieces.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: My sources have also informed me that due to popular demand, they can now be redeemed for a free name change! Handy!

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: You can get an Old School Bond from other players or from the Grand Exchange.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Simply click the bond and choose the redeem option.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: You get 14 days membership from an Old School Bond.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: At the moment Old School Bonds can only be redeemed for membership and for display name changes.

lines.speaker: James
lines.text: Open the Bond Pouch from the Controls Settings and follow the instructions to buy a bond. You can then give the bond to another player or sell it on the Grand Exchange.
